name: twisting white hallway
description: I'm in a twisting white hallway
hints: A white hallway connecting several areas. The white door is to the north.
NORTH leads to the white room with a security door. EAST connects to the blue hallway. DOWN returns to the main corridor.
Go NORTH to reach the white visitor door (needs visitor-level ID or higher). EAST to blue hallway, DOWN to main corridor.
notes: White hallway connecting the main corridor (D/room 3), white security door (N/room 9), and blue hallway (E/room 8).
